title: Relay store: subscription_invoices table + CRUD
description:
Add subscription_invoices table to relay SQLite store with CRUD methods for invoice lifecycle.

What: persist pending subscription invoices so the payment watcher can match incoming payments to pub_ids.

Algorithm:
1. In relay/src/store.rs, add migration (next version after current) creating:
   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscription_invoices (
       address       TEXT PRIMARY KEY,   -- bech32m UA string, unique per invoice
       pub_id        TEXT NOT NULL,
       amount_zatoshi INTEGER NOT NULL,
       expires_at    TEXT NOT NULL        -- YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
   )
2. Add pub async fn create_invoice(&self, pub_id: &str, address: &str, amount_zatoshi: u64, expires_at: DateTime<Utc>) -> Result<()>
   - Formats expires_at as %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S (same pattern as set_subscription).
   - INSERT OR IGNORE — if address already exists, do nothing (idempotent for retry).
3. Add pub async fn get_pending_invoice(&self, pub_id: &str) -> Result<Option<InvoiceRow>>
   - SELECT WHERE pub_id = ? AND expires_at > datetime('now')
   - Used to enforce one-invoice-per-pub_id rate limit.
4. Add pub async fn get_invoice_by_address(&self, address: &str) -> Result<Option<InvoiceRow>>
   - SELECT WHERE address = ? AND expires_at > datetime('now')
   - Used by payment watcher to match payment to pub_id.
5. Add pub async fn delete_invoice(&self, address: &str) -> Result<()>
   - Called after payment confirmed and subscription activated.
6. Add pub async fn purge_expired_invoices(&self) -> Result<u64>
   - DELETE WHERE expires_at < datetime('now'); return rows deleted.
7. Add InvoiceRow struct: { address: String, pub_id: String, amount_zatoshi: u64, expires_at: String }

Defensive rules:
- amount_zatoshi stored as INTEGER — use i64::try_from(u64) with descriptive error (same pattern as WalletStore).
- expires_at in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format — enforce at write time via format string, never from caller string.
- purge_expired_invoices should be called on a timer (every 5 minutes) from main.rs to prevent table bloat.

Tests:
- create_invoice then get_pending_invoice returns the row.
- get_pending_invoice on expired invoice returns None.
- delete_invoice removes the row; subsequent get_invoice_by_address returns None.
- purge_expired_invoices deletes only expired rows, not future ones.
- Two create_invoice calls for same pub_id; get_pending_invoice returns the first (older one stays, rate-limit check is caller responsibility).
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay passes; all 5 store tests pass
